subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad, O Afnán! On this Day from the waves of the Most Great Sea is heard this most complete and mighty Word: "The Kingdom..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد یا افنانی امروز از امواج بحر اعظم اینکلمه تامه کبری اصغا میشود الملک
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @personal instructions, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
